# Dinosaurs are in a jungle scene at sunset.

A cunning dinosaur lurks in the shadows, its piercing gaze locked onto its unsuspecting prey, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

Calendar outlinedPublished on March 13, 2025SafetyLicensed under the [Unsplash+ License](https://unsplash.com/plus/license)
